# 🏭 Steel Manufacturing System - Pull Request

## 📝 Description

**What does this PR do?**
Briefly describe the changes and the motivation behind them.

**Related Issues:**
- Fixes #(issue number)
- Closes #(issue number)
- Related to #(issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change

Please check the type of change your PR introduces:

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation** (changes to documentation only)
- [ ] 🎨 **Style** (formatting, missing semi colons, etc; no code change)
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactoring** (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance** (code change that improves performance)
- [ ] ✅ **Test** (adding missing tests or correcting existing tests)
- [ ] 🔧 **Build/CI** (changes to build process or continuous integration)

## ✅ Checklist

**Code Quality:**
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

**Testing:**
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested this change manually in the application

**Documentation:**
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if necessary
- [ ] I have updated relevant docstrings
- [ ] I have added/updated comments for complex logic
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md

**Database:**
- [ ] No database changes required
- [ ] Database migrations included (if applicable)
- [ ] Database changes are backward compatible
- [ ] Sample data updated if necessary
